title: 17D/15N Voyage of Hope & Faith – Marian Pilgrimage Experience 2026
details: A blessed Marian pilgrimage through Portugal, Spain, Andorra, France, Italy, and Vatican City. Visit Fatima, Lourdes, Santiago sites, La Sagrada Familia, St. Peter’s Basilica, and attend a Papal Audience. Includes licensed English-speaking guide, modern coach, high-speed train, hotels, daily breakfast and dinner, and full religious itinerary.
flyer: assets/data/packages/europe/17D/15N Voyage of Hope & Faith – Marian Pilgrimage Experience 2026/Flyer_1764745081.png

itinerary.day_details: Check in at NAIA. Enjoy amenities, meals, and entertainment on board. Arrival in Lisbon International Airport, meet tour director, transfer to hotel for check-in.

Lisbon city tour: Tagus River, Marques de Pombal Square, Liberdade Avenue, Belem Palace (official residence of Portugal’s President). See Jeronimos Monastery, Baixa, Praca do Comercio, and the suspension bridge. Visit the Church of Santo Antonio. Proceed to Fatima and visit the Sanctuary and Great White Basilica.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/17D/15N Voyage of Hope & Faith – Marian Pilgrimage Experience 2026/Day2_1764747837.png

itinerary.day_details: Visit the Basilica (tombs of Lucia, Francisco, Jacinta), Chapel of Apparitions, Church of the Holy Trinity, and the Fatima Light and Peace exposition. Visit Aljustrel village where the shepherds lived. Continue to Valinhos and Stations of the Cross. Evening candlelight procession.
Free time in Fatima then travel to Salamanca. Visit Salamanca Cathedral (UNESCO World Heritage Site). Continue to Madrid for hotel check-in.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/17D/15N Voyage of Hope & Faith – Marian Pilgrimage Experience 2026/Day4_1764747768.png

itinerary.day_details: Visit the Royal Palace and Almudena Cathedral. Free time to explore and enjoy Madrid city highlights. Dinner and overnight in Madrid.
Travel to Zaragoza and visit the Basilica of Our Lady of the Pillar (apparition of the Virgin Mary to Saint James). Free time before continuing to Barcelona for hotel check-in.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/17D/15N Voyage of Hope & Faith – Marian Pilgrimage Experience 2026/Day6_1764747774.png

itinerary.day_details: Visit Montserrat and its Black Madonna, a major pilgrimage site. Explore the Basilica and monastery. Return to Barcelona and visit La Sagrada Familia and the Gothic Quarter. Free time in Las Ramblas if time permits.
Travel to Andorra. Visit Romanesque Sant Esteve Church and enjoy views of the Pyrenees. Continue to Lourdes. Evening candlelight procession.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/17D/15N Voyage of Hope & Faith – Marian Pilgrimage Experience 2026/Day8_1764747800.png

itinerary.day_details: Guided visit to Lourdes Sanctuary: Underground Basilica, Stations of the Cross, Holy Bath, Grotto, and veneration sites. Afternoon high-speed train to Paris and hotel check-in.

Experience the Seine River Cruise. Guided Paris city tour including Chapel of Our Lady of the Miraculous Medal, Eiffel Tower (view), Champs Elysees, Arc de Triomphe, Place de la Concorde, and Les Invalides. Free time at Galleries Lafayette shopping district.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/europe/17D/15N Voyage of Hope & Faith – Marian Pilgrimage Experience 2026/Day10_1764747806.png

itinerary.day_details: Flight to Florence. City tour including the Duomo, Brunelleschi’s dome, Giotto’s Bell Tower, and other historic sites. Dinner and overnight in Florence.
Travel to Assisi. Visit St. Mary of the Angels Basilica and the Porziuncola. Tours of the Basilica of St. Francis, his relics, his personal possessions, and the Chapel of St. Clare. Hotel check-in.

itinerary.day_title: Day 13: Loreto → Lanciano → San Giovanni Rotondo (B/D)
itinerary.day_details: Visit the Marian Shrine of Loreto (Holy House of Nazareth). Continue to Lanciano to see the Eucharistic Miracle. Proceed to San Giovanni Rotondo for hotel check-in.
Spend the day visiting the Shrine of Saint Padre Pio, his tomb and crypt. Free time for prayer. Continue to Rome for overnight.
Visit the Roman Colosseum (photo stop), Roman Forum, Monument Vittorio Emanuele II, Piazza Venezia, Trevi Fountain, and Piazza di Spagna (shopping and dining time).
Visit Vatican City. Attend Papal Audience (subject to schedule) or guided visit to St. Peter’s Basilica. Free time for lunch and souvenir shopping. Transfer to airport for flight home.
Arrival in Manila. Home sweet home.

inclusions: Paris–Florence flight with 23 kg check-in and 7 kg hand-carry
Hotel accommodation (twin sharing) in 4-star local hotels
Tours and sightseeing with licensed English-speaking local guides
City taxes, hotel taxes, tourist taxes, and permits
Mandatory tipping for guide and driver
Daily bottled water per person on coach
exclusions: Items not mentioned in the inclusions
extra_details: Total downpayment of $600 required to start visa processing
Full cancellation charges apply within 30 days of departure
Rebooking allowed only due to force majeure and government restrictions
Subject to hotel and airline availability
